zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Ashton於大約1480年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓時，她的父親Sir Richard de Ashton38歲，母親Lady Isabel Talbot37歲。她於1509年與William Holt在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年在她的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Ashton于大约1480年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Ashton38岁，母亲Lady Isabel Talbot37岁。她于1509年与William Holt在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1524年在她的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Ashton was born about 1480, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard de Ashton, was 38 and her mother, Lady Isabel Talbot, was 37. She married William Holt in 1509, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1524, in her hometown, at the age of 45.

Elle a épousé William Holt en 1509, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1524, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Ashtonが約1480年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Ashtonは38歳，母Lady Isabel Talbotは37歳であった。1509年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンでWilliam Holtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1524年に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Ashton(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Ashton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel Talbot(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 William Holt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Ashton родилась около 1480 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Ashton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Talbot, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Holt в 1509 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1524 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.
